name: Tax-Free Sales for Further Manufacture or Export

eligibility.description: Requires the manufacturer to obtain proof of export or further manufacture within 6 months and, in some cases, accept a good-faith certification from the purchaser.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts manufacturers from excise tax on sales of articles intended for further manufacture, export, or use as vessel/aircraft supplies.
